name: Device Info Query
description: Queries the controller for hardware version, bootloader version, and firmware version via the GENERAL VersionInquiry command (cmd_set=0, cmd_id=1). The response payload is parsed into a human-readable string. This is the same command used by FreeFCC and dji-firmware-tools for firmware identification.
source: GENERAL VersionInquiry — cmd_set=0 (GENERAL), cmd_id=1 (VersionInquiry). Response layout documented in dji-firmware-tools DJIPayload_General_VersionInquiryRe: bytes 2-17 = hardware version (16-char ASCII), bytes 18-21 = bootloader version (uint32 LE), bytes 22-25 = firmware version (uint32 LE).
